description: verify a ledger — Ledger-v2 cryptographic prev-chain recompute + structural run-ledger integrity (the SV-2 'verify' act)
rules: read-only — walks the target ledger, never writes to it

a Ledger-v2 chain (JSONL / list / {entries}) is re-verified cryptographically: each prev is recomputed as the prior link's digest (infra.cwp.ledger.verify_chain); tamper or a transplanted genesis is NAMED
a structural run-ledger ({script, runs}) is checked for step provenance + 1..N ordering
a recorded refusal/waiver is evidence, not corruption (meta-rule M4)
usage: Set TARGET_LEDGER (a Ledger-v2 chain — JSONL/list/{entries} — or an executor run-ledger.json). Output: ledgercheck.json with {mode, records, bad_records, chain}.
limitation: Recomputes the prev-hash chain (RFC-8785 form, Go-anchored). Concurrency/crash durability (the torture / crashloop perks) arrives with P1-T02/P1-T09.
